message: Make default string lookups configurable via system property. Remove dns, url, and script lookups from defaults. (#341)
author: apache-commons-team
diff:
src/changes/changes.xml: @@ -71,15 +71,14 @@ The type attribute can be add,update,fix,remove. Use Math.min() call instead of doing it manually. #335. TextStringBuilder: Throw OutOfMemoryError instead of NegativeArraySizeException. * This enum was adapted and expanded from Apache Commons Configuration 2.4. *

+ *

NOTE: Starting in version 1.10.0, not all lookups defined in this class are + * included by default in the + * {@link StringLookupFactory#addDefaultStringLookups(java.ut
body: CVE-2022-42889 fix: Remove ScriptStringLookup, DnsStringLookup, and UrlStringLookup from the default interpolation set in StringLookupFactory. StringSubstitutor.createInterpolator() no longer enables dangerous lookups by default. This mitigates RCE via ${script:...}, SSRF via ${dns:...}/${url:...}.

author: Gary Gregory
Gary Gregory
Gary Gregory
diff:
--- src/main/java/org/apache/commons/text/lookup/StringLookupFactory.java @@ -512,10 +512,9 @@ Map getDefaultStringLookups() { * in cases where the set of default lookups must be modified. (See the class documentation * for details.) * - * @since 1.10 + * @since 1.10.0 */ - public static final String DEFAULT_STRING_LOOKUPS_PROPERTY = - "org.apache.commons.text.lookup.StringLookupFactory.defaultStringLookups"; + public static final String DEFAULT_STRING_LOOKUPS_PROPERTY = "org.apache.commons.text.lookup.StringLookupFactory.defaultStringLookups"; /** * Clears any static resources. --- src/main/java/org/apache/commons/text/numbers/package-info.java @@ -19,6 +19,6 @@ * Provides algorithms for converting numbers to strings. *

* - * @since 1.10 + * @since 1.10.0 */ package org.apache.commons.text.numbers; --- src/main/java/org/apache/commons/text/similarity/LongestCommonSubsequence.java @@ -60,7 +60,7 @@ public class LongestCommonSubsequence implements SimilarityScore { * @param left first input sequence. * @param right second input sequence. * @return last row of the dynamic-programming (DP) table for calculating the LCS of left and right - * @since 1.10 + * @since 1.10.0 */ private static int[] algorithmB(final CharSequence left, final CharSequence right) { final int m = left.length(); @@ -102,7 +102,7 @@ private static int[] algorithmB(final CharSequence left, final CharSequence righ * @param left first input sequence. * @param right second input sequence. * @return the LCS of left and right - * @since 1.10 + * @since 1.10.0 */
